mapper.sql: member_id ,login_id ,enc_passwd ,passwd_dt ,passwd_init ,member_nm ,nickname ,gender ,authority_id ,fn_cmm_get_authority_nm(authority_id) as authority_nm ,member_st ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MEMBER_ST', member_st) as member_st_nm ,member_st_dt ,member_type ,black_list_begin_day ,black_list_end_day ,black_list_reason ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_GROUP}', member_type) as member_type_nm ,ci ,enc_email ,enc_birthday ,enc_mobile_no ,bizrno ,refresh_token ,kakao_token ,naver_token ,google_token ,last_login_dt ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt
mapper.select: /** CmmtMemberDao.selectEntrprsSttusList */ select cc.code_nm as member_type_nm , count(cm.member_id) as tot_cnt , count(sub.apply_id) as last_slctn_cnt , sum(case when (to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') between sub.bsns_bgnde and sub.bsns_endde) then 1 else 0 end) as bsns_ing , sum(case when (to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') > sub.bsns_endde) then 1 else 0 end) as bsns_end from cmmt_code cc inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_type = cc.code left outer join ( select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.member_id , ubp.bsns_bgnde , ubp.bsns_endde from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd where ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_COMPT_CODE}' and ubpa.slctn = true and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} ) sub on sub.member_id = cm.member_id where cc.code_type = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_TYPE}' and cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_GROUP}' and cc.code != 'INDIVIDUAL' group by cc.code_nm, cc.sort_order order by cc.sort_order

/** CmmtMemberDao.selectBsnsPortSttusList */ select cc.code_nm as member_type_nm , count(sub.apply_id) as task_cnt , sum(coalesce(sub.excut_sbsidy, 0)) as excut_sbsidy , sum(coalesce(sub.excut_bsnm_alotm, 0)) as excut_bsnm_alotm , sum(coalesce(sub.excut_cnvn_totamt , 0)) as excut_cnvn_totamt from cmmt_code cc inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_type = cc.code left outer join ( select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.member_id , ube.excut_sbsidy , ube.excut_bsnm_alotm , ube.excut_cnvn_totamt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and uep.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uels.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.evl_last_slctn_id = uels.evl_last_slctn_id and ulst.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs on ubs.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd on ubpd.bsns_slctn_id = ubs.bsns_slctn_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@CNVN_STTS_CMP}' inner join uspt_bsns_excclc ube on ube.bsns_cnvn_id = ubc.bsns_cnvn_id where ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_COMPT_CODE}' and ubpa.slctn = true and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} ) sub on sub.member_id = cm.member_id where cc.code_type = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_TYPE}' and cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_GROUP}' group by cc.code_nm, cc.sort_order order by cc.sort_order

/** CmmtMemberDao.selectBizListTotCnt */ select count(1) from cmmt_member where member_type in ('SOLE', 'CORPORATION' , 'UNIVERSITY') /*개인사업자,법인사업자,대학회원*/ and member_st = 'NORMAL' /*회원상탱-정상*/ and member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%')

/** CmmtMemberDao.selectBizList */ select member_id ,member_nm ,ceo_nm ,bizrno from cmmt_member where member_type in ('SOLE', 'CORPORATION' , 'UNIVERSITY') /*개인사업자,법인사업자,대학회원*/ and member_st = 'NORMAL' /*회원상탱-정상*/ and member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%')
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}
